children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established an advisory council to be known as the National Advisory Council for Healthcare Research and Quality.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Advisory Council shall advise the Secretary and the Director with respect to activities proposed or undertaken to carry out the mission of the Agency under .section 299(b) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: priorities regarding health care research, especially studies related to quality, outcomes, cost and the utilization of, and access to, health care services;

children.label: B
children.text: the field of health care research and related disciplines, especially issues related to training needs, and dissemination of information pertaining to health care quality; and

children.label: C
children.text: the appropriate role of the Agency in each of these areas in light of private sector activity and identification of opportunities for public-private sector partnerships.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Advisory Council shall, in accordance with this subsection, be composed of appointed members and ex officio members. All members of the Advisory Council shall be voting members other than the individuals designated under paragraph (3)(B) as ex officio members.

children.label: A
children.text: three shall be individuals distinguished in the conduct of research, demonstration projects, and evaluations with respect to health care;

children.label: B
children.text: three shall be individuals distinguished in the fields of health care quality research or health care improvement;

children.label: C
children.text: three shall be individuals distinguished in the practice of medicine of which at least one shall be a primary care practitioner;

children.label: D
children.text: three shall be individuals distinguished in the other health professions;

children.label: E
children.text: three shall be individuals either representing the private health care sector, including health plans, providers, and purchasers or individuals distinguished as administrators of health care delivery systems;

children.label: F
children.text: three shall be individuals distinguished in the fields of health care economics, information systems, law, ethics, business, or public policy; and

children.label: G
children.text: three shall be individuals representing the interests of patients and consumers of health care.

children.label: A
children.text: the Assistant Secretary for Health, the Director of the National Institutes of Health, the Director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, the Administrator of the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services, the Commissioner of the Food and Drug Administration, the Director of the Office of Personnel Management, the Assistant Secretary of Defense (Health Affairs), and the Under Secretary for Health of the Department of Veterans Affairs; and

children.label: B
children.text: such other Federal officials as the Secretary may consider appropriate.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Members of the Advisory Council appointed under subsection (c)(2) shall serve for a term of 3 years.

children.heading: Staggered terms
children.label: 2 Staggered terms
children.text: To ensure the staggered rotation of one-third of the members of the Advisory Council each year, the Secretary is authorized to appoint the initial members of the Advisory Council for terms of 1, 2, or 3 years.

children.heading: Service beyond term
children.label: 3 Service beyond term
children.text: A member of the Council appointed under subsection (c)(2) may continue to serve after the expiration of the term of the members until a successor is appointed.

children.heading: Vacancies
children.label: e Vacancies
children.text: If a member of the Advisory Council appointed under subsection (c)(2) does not serve the full term applicable under subsection (d), the individual appointed to fill the resulting vacancy shall be appointed for the remainder of the term of the predecessor of the individual.

children.heading: Chair
children.label: f Chair
children.text: The Director shall, from among the members of the Advisory Council appointed under subsection (c)(2), designate an individual to serve as the chair of the Advisory Council.

children.heading: Meetings
children.label: g Meetings
children.text: The Advisory Council shall meet not less than once during each discrete 4-month period and shall otherwise meet at the call of the Director or the chair.

children.heading: Compensation and reimbursement of expenses
children.label: h Compensation and reimbursement of expenses

children.heading: Appointed members
children.label: 1 Appointed members
children.text: Members of the Advisory Council appointed under subsection (c)(2) shall receive compensation for each day (including travel time) engaged in carrying out the duties of the Advisory Council unless declined by the member. Such compensation may not be in an amount in excess of the daily equivalent of the annual rate of basic pay prescribed for level IV of the Executive Schedule under for each day during which such member is engaged in the performance of the duties of the Advisory Council.section 5315 of title 5

children.heading: Ex officio members
children.label: 2 Ex officio members
children.text: Officials designated under subsection (c)(3) as ex officio members of the Advisory Council may not receive compensation for service on the Advisory Council in addition to the compensation otherwise received for duties carried out as officers of the United States.

children.heading: Staff
children.label: i Staff
children.text: The Director shall provide to the Advisory Council such staff, information, and other assistance as may be necessary to carry out the duties of the Council.

children.heading: Duration
children.label: j Duration
children.text: Notwithstanding , the Advisory Council shall continue in existence until otherwise provided by law.section 1013(a) of title 5
